findings.title: Russia launches massive 700-drone strike on Ukraine
findings.summary: Russian forces conducted a prolonged strike series against Ukraine, launching a total of 700 drones in two waves on April 1, 2026. This indicates escalation in intensity of aerial attacks (I3: increased attacks or strikes). Kremlin simultaneously pressed Zelenskyy for immediate Donbas withdrawal, signaling diplomatic maneuvering amid ongoing hostilities.
findings.source_name: Institute for the Study of War (ISW)

sources_cited.source_name: Institute for the Study of War (ISW)
sources_cited.excerpt: Russian forces conducted another prolonged strike series against Ukraine with a total of 700 drones launched in two waves.
Kremlin Presses Zelenskyy for Immediate Donbas Withdrawal April 1, 2026
